Indices General Index Module Index

Python Module Index

ModuleDescription
news.modelsArticle and Category models
news.viewsCRUD views for articles and categories
news.serializersSerializers for the news app
news.urlsURL patterns for the news app
users.modelsCustomUser model
users.viewsRegistration and user management views
users.serializersSerializers for the users app
users.urlsURL patterns for the users app
